meaning: adj.[医](细菌等)无毒力的,无致病力的,无毒性的
examples: Its characteristic is long do not fade, natural, beautiful, avirulent insipidity.
Newcastle disease virus (NDV) avirulent strain B95 was newly introduced from abroad.
The invention of molecular labeling method of Pyricularia grisea avirulent gene belongs to the field of agricultural biotechnology.
